tier1.purpose: Character creation — picker, gates, PPE display, sources

completeRowRequires.sources: at least one Dark Designs entry with pageNumber
completeRowRequires.form: limitations.usableInNightbaneForm defaults to morphus_only; use limitations.formUsage when rules differ by target or phase

tier2.purpose: Active play — FeatureCard, combat, resource recovery (planned)
